name: Tray Collapse 托盘折叠
description:
Collapse AppIndicator tray icons into an expandable drawer in the top bar (like the Windows overflow area), so a crowded tray no longer squeezes the clock. Per-icon collapse/pin settings, adjustable icon spacing, automatic dedup of unstable icon ids. Requires the AppIndicator extension.

把 AppIndicator 托盘图标收进顶栏的可展开抽屉（像 Windows 的溢出区），避免图标越堆越多挤掉时钟。支持逐个图标收纳/常驻、间距调节、不稳定 id 自动去重。需要 AppIndicator 扩展。
